message:
fix(frankensqlite): adapt value conversions to SqliteValue's new Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> inner types

SqliteValue::Text and SqliteValue::Blob changed from owning String/Vec<u8>
to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]>. Update value_to_sqlite to use .into() for zero-copy
conversion from String/Vec<u8> into Arc types, and update sqlite_to_value
to use .to_string()/.to_vec() to extract owned data from Arc wrappers.
Fix test assertions to construct expected Blob values with .into().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
